title: All production stream references use RedisStreams constant
evidence: Grep scan of xadd/xReadGroup/createConsumerGroup in services/ and shared/ — all use RedisStreams.* constants. Hardcoded strings only in test files.

title: All consumer groups consistent — dynamic failover group confirmed
evidence: Groups found: coordinator-group, cross-chain-detector-group, execution-engine-group, mempool-detector-group, orderflow-pipeline. Dynamic failover-{serviceName} confirmed at cross-region-health.ts:750.

title: All 24 streams have MAXLEN; HMAC DLQ path uses xaddWithLimit()
evidence: STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS covers all 24 streams. HMAC rejection DLQ path (~streams.ts:917) uses xaddWithLimit() — v2.3 known issue resolved.

title: XACK handled internally by StreamConsumer abstraction
evidence: stream-consumer.ts:262,371 performs batch XACK. All consumers use this abstraction.

title: 15 undocumented behavior-controlling env vars
evidence: Missing from .env.example: CONSUMER_BATCH_SIZE, CONSUMER_BLOCK_MS, CONSUMER_SHUTDOWN_ACK_TIMEOUT_MS, CONSUMER_PENDING_MAX_AGE_MS, CONSUMER_STALE_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS, EXECUTION_STREAM_BACKPRESSURE_RATIO, ORDERFLOW_PREDICTION_CACHE_TTL_MS, L1_ORACLE_CACHE_TTL_MS, RISK_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX, API_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS, API_RATE_LIMIT_MAX, LEADER_LOCK_KEY, AB_TEST_ALLOCATION_SEED, AB_STAGE_DURATION_MS, AB_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_LOSSES
expected: All behavior-controlling env vars documented in .env.example
recommendation: Add all 15 to .env.example with descriptions and defaults

title: ~44 undocumented custom env vars
evidence: Custom vars not matching HIGH criteria and not documented in .env.example. Includes various service-specific configuration vars.
recommendation: Audit and add to .env.example grouped by service

title: Env var drift summary: 0 CRITICAL, 15 HIGH, ~44 MEDIUM undocumented
evidence: Full bidirectional diff of 335 code env vars vs .env.example. 0 CRITICAL undocumented security secrets. 15 HIGH behavior-controlling. ~44 MEDIUM other.

title: Zero || 0 anti-pattern instances in production TypeScript
evidence: Grep for || 0 and || 0n in services/ and shared/ found 0 matches. ESLint enforcement effective.

title: HMAC signing fully documented and implemented
evidence: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY at .env.example:535. STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS (rotation) at :539. Fail-closed in production.

title: FEATURE_DYNAMIC_L1_FEES not documented in .env.example
evidence: feature-flags.ts uses opt-out pattern (=== false): FEATURE_DYNAMIC_L1_FEES. Enabled by default, affects L2 cost accuracy. Not in .env.example.
recommendation: Add: FEATURE_DYNAMIC_L1_FEES= # Set to false to disable dynamic L1 fee estimation (default: enabled)

title: FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2 not documented in .env.example
evidence: feature-flags.ts defines FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2. Not found in .env.example.

title: All 23 feature flags present; no cross-dependency violations
evidence: FEATURE_SIGNAL_CACHE_READ requires FEATURE_ML_SIGNAL_SCORING verified. FEATURE_DYNAMIC_L1_FEES uses opt-out (on by default).

title: Risk configuration fully documented with cross-validation
evidence: RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL (:1054), RISK_KELLY_MULTIPLIER (:1094), RISK_MAX_SINGLE_TRADE (:1096), RISK_MIN_EV_THRESHOLD (:1078), RISK_MIN_WIN_PROBABILITY (:1080), RISK_MAX_LOSS_PER_TRADE (:1082) all in .env.example. Cross-validation at risk-config.ts:328.
expected: All risk vars documented with cross-validation

title: Production code uses safe parse utilities — no unprotected parseInt found
evidence: parseEnvInt(), safeParseInt(), parseEnvTimeout(), parseEnvFloat() from shared/core/src/utils/ used consistently in execution-engine, coordinator, cross-chain-detector.
actual: Confirmed — safe parse utilities used throughout

title: RedisClient and RedisStreamsClient fully aligned — split-brain FIXED
evidence: Both: maxRetriesPerRequest=3, lazyConnect=true, connectTimeout=3000ms, identical retryStrategy never returning null. v2.3 split-brain issue resolved.

title: No port collisions — unified-detector port corrected to 3007
evidence: unified-detector/constants.ts: DEFAULT_HEALTH_CHECK_PORT=3007 (was 3001 in v2.3). execution-engine=3005, cross-chain=3006, mempool=3008. All match service-ports.json.

title: estimateUsdValue() silently returns undefined on failure (no logging)
evidence: cross-chain.strategy.ts:186 — catch { return undefined; } in estimateUsdValue(). Price estimation failure not logged.
expected: Price estimation failure logged at debug level
recommendation: Add: catch(e) { this.logger.debug('estimateUsdValue failed', {error}); return undefined; }

title: getWalletBalance() silently returns 'unavailable' on RPC error
evidence: cross-chain.strategy.ts:295 — catch { return 'unavailable'; }. Diagnostic function.
recommendation: Low priority — add debug log if needed

title: Stream lag health check swallowed in unified-detector (documented)
evidence: unified-detector/src/index.ts:166 — catch { // Stream check failed despite ping — don't fail health check }

title: Block height expiry check swallowed in Solana strategy (documented)
evidence: solana-execution.strategy.ts:490 — catch { // Block height check failed — don't abort, rely on timeout }

title: 4 silent catches found — all LOW severity with documented intent
evidence: All 4 instances have explaining comments or are in non-critical diagnostic code. No silent catches in hot-path execution.

title: Stream serialization type fidelity confirmed — parseFloat() restores all numeric fields
evidence: stream-serialization.ts:49-60 converts profitPercentage, confidence, expectedProfit, estimatedProfit via .toString(). validation.ts:328-337 restores all via parseFloat(). expiresAt via Number() at :295. Type guards work correctly post-restoration.
expected: All serialized numeric fields restored on deserialization

title: 10 unique Redis key prefixes — no collisions
evidence: coordinator:leader:lock, lock:execution:, bridge:recovery:, commit-reveal:, region:health:, pair:, price:, risk:probabilities:, auth:blacklist:. No collisions or substring overlaps between services.

title: ADR-022: No spread operators in price-matrix hot-path loops
evidence: caching/price-matrix.ts — spread only in config/stats object returns (lines 507, 1065), not inside loops.

title: ADR-033: No 30s global stale price threshold — using chain-aware freshness (5s default)
evidence: caching/price-matrix.ts getPriceWithFreshnessCheck() default maxAgeMs=5000ms. No STALE_PRICE_THRESHOLD=30000 constant. Detector uses chain-aware getOpportunityTimeoutMs() per chain. ADR-033 specifies 30s.
actual: 5s default, chain-aware. Likely intentional for fast chains (Arbitrum 2s).
recommendation: Update ADR-033 to reflect chain-aware implementation or add 30s max bound for slow chains

title: ADR-002: No direct inter-service HTTP calls
evidence: Grep for http://localhost:300[0-6] in services/ — only CORS whitelist config, no actual inter-service calls.
actual: Confirmed — all communication via Redis Streams

title: ADR-018: Circuit breaker default threshold = 5 confirmed
evidence: shared/core/src/resilience/circuit-breaker.ts:408: failureThreshold: 5.

title: ADR-005: SharedArrayBuffer confirmed as L1 cache
evidence: caching/price-matrix.ts:223-224: sharedBuffer: SharedArrayBuffer | null = null. Used as primary price storage.
expected: SharedArrayBuffer used for L1 price cache

title: Infrastructure configs aligned — Fly.io and Docker match code
evidence: Fly.io: coordinator 3000/api/health ✓, cross-chain 3006/health ✓, execution-engine 8080 (documented 3005 override via HEALTH_CHECK_PORT) ✓. Docker Compose health checks use /api/health for coordinator, /health for others. All Dockerfiles: node:22-alpine ✓.
actual: Confirmed — documented 8080 override intentional for Fly.io

title: Timeout hierarchy valid across all services
evidence: Coordinator: setupServiceShutdown 10000ms > Redis connectTimeout 3000ms ✓. Partitions: health-server SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS=8000ms > Redis 3000ms ✓. Execution engine: bootstrap=45000ms (30000+15000) > drain 30000ms > client SHUTDOWN_TIMEOUT_MS=5000ms > Redis 3000ms ✓.
